name: corcept_export_cloudevents
title: Corcept Export CloudEvents
description: Project the hash-chained ledger lines to CloudEvents JSONL (derived, non-authority). Authority: Observe (the source ledger is read-only; the output file is a derived artefact, not authority). Trust ceiling: Reviewed.

ledger.description: Path to the ledger JSONL file (default: .corcept/ledger/events.jsonl).
